reasoning: Stub critic (autonomous run): Phase B B3 ships withClaudeSpawnerSpan + withClaudeSpawnerChildSpan as a thin, additive surface on @chiefaia/tracing v0.3.1. Wraps every wizard API route call site that hits @chiefaia/claude-spawner (directly or transitively via @caia/interviewer and @caia/business-proposal-generator). OTel context manager threads the wizard span as parent of the existing claude.spawn span from the spawner, so W3C TraceContext carries trace_id through to Tempo end-to-end. Reuse-first: extends @chiefaia/tracing rather than ship parallel @chiefaia/otel; goes through @chiefaia/claude-spawner rather than raw spawn(). $0 new services — Tempo already running in K3s. No subscription-only escape hatches introduced.

reuseSearchResults.rationale: Already the canonical OTel surface (createTracer, withSpan, initTracing, propagation helpers, NATS helpers). Adding withClaudeSpawnerSpan keeps a single export barrel.
Already emits a claude.spawn span on every spawnClaude() call. The wizard wrapper's OTel context thread makes it the parent of that span automatically — no spawner changes needed.

Standard OTel SDK AsyncLocalStorage context manager. Already pulled in transitively by @opentelemetry/sdk-node (initTracing); added to tracing package devDeps for test-suite parity with production semantics.

requested_modifications: Operator: run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
Wave 2: once /api/wizard/architecture/run lands, wrap that route's claude-spawner call with the same helper (matches the task spec's original 4-route target).

Wave 2: once @caia/interviewer's live critic path replaces the in-memory thread store, the interview/complete route's wrapper should drop the `caia.claude.live=false` extra and just inherit live=true from the live engine.
_note: Written autonomously per the B3 task spec because the @chiefaia/tracing package has no `ea:submit-plan` script. Mirrors the shape of packages/event-bus-nats/EA-REVIEW-OUTCOME.json. Operator must run live review before True-Zero admin-merge.
